product.name: ArWoWear T4 Soft
descriptions: ArWoWear T4 Soft is light weight 200 g/m², 65% Polyester 35% Cotton durable workwear twill fabric.
It is the economical version of ArWoWear T4 series.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Generic durable workwear/coverall twill without explicit military or uniformed-service statement.

stage1.noMatchReason: Product is a generic economical polyester/cotton twill workwear fabric intended for coveralls/uniforms with OEKO-TEX certification and water/oil repellency; no explicit sector such as military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building or transport is stated.

evidence: 65% Polyester 35% Cotton Uniform application image label
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly positioned as an economical workwear twill for coveralls/uniforms with no narrower sector (military, firefighting, energy, etc.) explicitly stated, matching the general workwear-industrial category.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary application is explicitly supported by the product data; military was only listed as a rejected possibility due to lack of explicit uniformed-service statement.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No explicit military, police or tactical statement; only generic coverall/uniform wording.
